name: Creation of a Privileged Container
notes: This rule detects the creation of a privileged container. Running a container with the privileged flag gives all capabilities to the container including the access to the host device.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System, BB:DeviceDefiniton: Containers
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Machine Creation Success, Audit.Machine Start Success
when the event matches Privileged Container (custom) is any of [1 or true]
TD_list: APPLY Creation of a Privileged Container on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System, BB:DeviceDefiniton: Containers
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Machine Creation Success, Audit.Machine Start Success
AND when the event matches Privileged Container (custom) is any of [1 or true]
RED_list: Event name: Creation of Privileged Container
Event description: Detects creation of privileged container.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
